commit.message:
fix: PWA login scope, video upload corruption, CAE form responsiveness

- Move PWA meta tags from terrain layout to root layout metadata API
  so Safari sees them on /login (standalone mode works)
- Fix video upload: skip File double-wrapping when compressImage returns
  original file unchanged (compressed === file check)
- Make CAE/VT form responsive: sidebar collapses to horizontal scroll
  on mobile, wizard grids stack vertically on small screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add verified prediction market trading platform

Four AI agents scan prediction markets, commit predictions on-chain
via Chainlink CRE, and get scored by an independent oracle via
Chainlink Functions. Contracts deployed on Ethereum Sepolia and
verified on Tenderly Virtual TestNet.

- SignalRegistry + AccuracyLedger with real Chainlink DON scoring
- SeptonsVault with Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
- Market Scout, Autonomous Trader, Portfolio Manager, Intelligence Advisor
- Next.js dashboard with RainbowKit wallet connect
- CRE signal recorder workflow
- Deploy scripts for Sepolia and Tenderly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Protocol-agnostic AI agents platform for prediction markets — Market Scout, Autonomous Trader, Portfolio Manager, Intelligence Advisor + Chainlink CRE integration

commit.message:
fix: Chrome extension recursive message loop breaking prompt generation

Background's handlePlayAudioLogo was sending PLAY_AUDIO_LOGO message back
to itself via chrome.runtime.sendMessage, causing infinite recursion that
crashed the service worker and killed all message handlers including
GENERATE_PROMPT. Renamed offscreen message to OFFSCREEN_PLAY_AUDIO.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Add DataPrivacyConsent.swift to Xcode project

File was on disk but missing from project.pbxproj, causing
"Cannot find 'DataPrivacyConsent' in scope" build error.

commit.message:
Major feature update: tabs, dark mode, insights, comparison, auto-refresh

- Add tab navigation (Insights, Metro, County, City, ZIP, State, Compare)
- Add Insights tab with 6 market category panels and state filter
- Add Compare tab for side-by-side market comparison with trend charts
- Add dark mode with Sun/Moon toggle, persisted to localStorage
- Add custom REALTR SVG logo
- Add watchlist (favorites) with FAB and panel
- Add column visibility toggles and share-by-URL in DataTable
- Add market comparison feature on detail page with 8 trend charts
- Add collapsible filter sections in FilterPanel
- Auto-fetch stale data on server startup (1-day threshold)
- Fix data retention: use INSERT OR REPLACE to keep data during re-fetch
- Skip seasonally-adjusted rows to ensure price_drops/inventory_yoy populated
- Frontend auto-invalidates query cache when background fetch completes
- Remove manual Fetch Data buttons — data updates automatically
- Expand cron jobs to cover all region types (Wed & Sat at 3 AM)

Alt LM probe: 4/4 LLMs confirm MAE > CLIP > V-JEPA2 ranking is structural

Add extraction script for Qwen 2.5 7B/32B and Llama 3.1 8B, plus
cross-LM codebook agreement probe. All four architectures replicate
the same pattern: LMs align best with static reconstruction (MAE),
worst with temporal prediction (V-JEPA2). Expanded phrase bank to
61 concepts / 323 events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add mlx-whisper GPU acceleration and Ollama LLM post-processing

- Apple Silicon now uses mlx-whisper (GPU/Neural Engine) instead of faster-whisper
- Re-introduce Ollama LLM polish: corrects homophones and restores domain terminology
- LLM prompt: preserves speaker's original words, keeps mixed Chinese/English as spoken
- Ollama timeout set to 5s with rule-clean fallback to avoid blocking
- server.py: add temperature=0, condition_on_previous_text=False to reduce hallucination on long audio
- keep_alive: 300s (5 min) to balance memory vs. response speed
- install.sh: auto-selects mlx-whisper or faster-whisper based on chip; auto-installs Ollama
- README and CLAUDE.md updated to reflect new architecture

commit.message:
Redesign scheduled tasks with preset templates

Replaces the blank form with a browsable grid of preset templates
organized by category (Work, Communication, Calendar, Research):

- Daily standup prep (Linear + calendar)
- Weekly review (full wrap-up via email)
- PR review queue (GitHub)
- Linear triage (overdue/unestimated issues)
- Inbox digest (Gmail)
- Slack digest
- Week ahead preview (Sunday calendar look-ahead)
- Light vs heavy day check
- Industry news digest (web search)
- Build your own (custom prompt)

Click a preset to pre-fill the form. Already-added presets are
marked and disabled. The form is still fully editable before saving.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: login inputs white due to browser autofill override

Add global webkit-autofill override to keep input background
consistent with --secondary color across login and register.

commit.message:
Initial commit: R programming skills collection for Claude Code

Add comprehensive collection of Claude Code skills for R programming:

Skills included:
- Core R: style guide, performance, OOP, package development
- Data Science: tidyverse patterns, ggplot2, dm-relational, rlang
- Statistics: Bayesian analysis with brms
- Development: TDD workflow, Shiny app development
- Meta: skillMaker for creating new skills

Repository setup:
- Project documentation (README.md, CLAUDE.md)
- Git configuration (.gitignore)

All skills follow best practices with proper YAML frontmatter,
trigger phrases, tool restrictions, and supporting documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: combat layout, ground items, adventure log, settings button (#45)

* fix: replace to_local() with Control-compatible position math

to_local() is a Node2D method and does not exist on Control/PanelContainer.
Use section.global_position - global_position instead, which is the correct
way to convert a global position to panel-local coordinates for Control nodes.

This caused a GDScript parse error that prevented combat_panel.gd from loading,
breaking test_combat_panel_no_crash and test_all_panels_instantiate_and_have_nodes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: combat layout, ground items visibility, adventure log, settings button

Combat panel (combat_panel.gd):
- Restructured layout: player placeholder on left, enemy sprite+HP+dice on right
- Hidden duplicate player HP bar inside combat (main top-bar is authoritative)
- Compact dice layout (56x56 panels, FONT_SMALL for log)
- Enemy dice get their own roll animation (slower, ? placeholders then reveal)
- Phase 5 emits state_changed so top-bar HP updates correctly

Explorer (explorer.gd):
- Fixed has_anything/has_ground_content to include searched containers with loot
- Fixed room flags to show GROUND ITEMS for containers too
- Removed redundant pre-refresh before open_menu() (double-refresh bug fix)
- Removed standalone Settings button; settings remain accessible via Menu

Exploration engine (exploration_engine.gd):
- Added _describe_ground_loot() - ports Python navigation.describe_ground_items()
- Called from both first-visit and revisit paths
- Logs containers (with [LOCKED]/[searched] suffix), gold, and loose items

Ground items panel (ground_items_panel.gd):
- Added null guard in refresh() to prevent crash before _build_ui() runs

Tests (test_ui_fixes_combat_ground.gd):
- 18 GUT tests across 5 groups: combat structure, enemy dice persistence,
  ground items panel, adventure log ground reporting, settings button removal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix remaining combat/ground-items/test issues

- Add player_hit signal to combat_panel.gd so the top bar HP bar
  can flash when the player takes damage (instead of only using
  state_changed)
- Connect player_hit signal in explorer.gd with flash animation handler
- Fix ground_items_panel.gd: use remove_child before queue_free for
  immediate UI cleanup
- Remove PlayerHPBar assertions from combat tests (player HP bar
  removed from combat panel)
- Remove _btn_settings assertions from UI polish tests (settings
  button removed from top bar)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DN4oTw5sJbum5p8MU45V6T

* Fix combat panel crash: add missing _log_text declaration, remove orphan ScrollContainer

The merge left combat_panel.gd with two issues:
1. _log_text (RichTextLabel) was used in _build_ui() but never declared
   as a member variable, causing _build_ui() to crash silently and
   preventing all named nodes (DiceContainer, EnemyHPBar, etc.) from
   being created — this was the root cause of 11 test failures.
2. An orphaned ScrollContainer was created but root VBox was added
   directly to self instead of to scroll.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DN4oTw5sJbum5p8MU45V6T

* fix: repair Godot test regressions on PR branch

* fix: hide overlay content immediately on close

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add AutoCatalysis: autonomous AI-driven CO2RR catalyst screening

Implements Tier 1 (theory-only) and Tier 2 (experimental validation)
of the AutoCatalysis agent loop for CO2 electroreduction catalyst
discovery using FAIRChem ML interatomic potentials and ISAAC
experimental benchmarks.

New files:
- tools/autocatalysis/program.md — Agent instructions with CO2RR domain knowledge
- tools/autocatalysis/explore.py — Catalyst candidate definitions (agent-modified)
- tools/autocatalysis/run_fairchem.py — FAIRChem UMA wrapper for adsorption energies
- tools/autocatalysis/evaluate.py — Scoring engine (volcano distance + Spearman ρ)
- tools/autocatalysis/isaac_client.py — ISAAC API client for experimental queries
- tools/autocatalysis/results.json — Evaluation iteration log
- tools/autocatalysis/README.md — Setup and usage guide
- tools/ingest_co2rr_literature.py — Ingest 10 published CO2RR datasets into ISAAC

All 10 literature records (Hori 1994, Kuhl 2012, Zhu 2013, Kim 2014,
Li 2012, Kas 2015) validate against the ISAAC schema with zero errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix review mining progress showing all zeros (#66)

* Fix auto-scan stopping prematurely

- Don't rely on data.complete flag to stop auto-scan — it uses
  getTotalScannedCount() which returns zeros due to service-role key bug,
  causing auto-scan to think there are no remaining listings
- Instead, only stop when scanned_this_batch === 0 (genuinely no more to scan)
- Don't stop auto-scan on errors — edge functions can timeout on large batches
  and the next batch picks up where it left off
- Add consecutive error counter — stops after 5 consecutive failures to prevent
  infinite retries (e.g. SerpAPI out of credits)
- Add 5-second delay between retries after errors (vs 1 second normally)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add sitemap viewer to admin panel

New /admin/sitemap page that fetches and parses the live sitemap,
showing URL count stats by category (listings, cities, states,
best-of, features, blog) with search/filter and a refresh button.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add missing pages to sitemap

Adds privacy-policy, terms-of-service, and add-listing pages
to the sitemap. These were the only public-facing routes not
previously included.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix reviewCount structured data error on Best Of pages

Only include aggregateRating in JSON-LD when both rating AND
review_count are positive. Google requires reviewCount to be
positive — listings with 0 reviews were triggering a structured
data error in Search Console.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix review mining progress showing all zeros

The getTotalScannedCount() function was using the anon key to call
the review_mine_counts RPC, which returns zeros due to RLS
restrictions. Switched to the service-role key so the counts
query works correctly.

commit.message:
Fix Find URLs pipeline: XML cache, skip logic, toolbar redesign, and url_source counter

- xml_fetcher.py: Add 30-day EIN-keyed cache via CacheManager for ProPublica XML
  downloads; sentinel value prevents re-fetching EINs with no 990 on file
- url_discovery_service.py: Fix skip logic to treat url_source IS NOT NULL as
  already-processed (was only skipping when website_url IS NOT NULL, causing
  not_found EINs to re-run the full pipeline every time)
- screening-module.js: Fix _isProcessedFor('urls') to check opp.url_source != null
  instead of opp.filing_history_loaded (field never returned by API — URLs counter
  was always showing 0 processed)
- index.html: Redesign SCREENING toolbar — 6 equal-width buttons with taller height
  (py-3), larger text (text-sm), sub-labels pulled out below buttons in a mirrored
  flex row for clean column alignment

commit.message:
Add Corsair Vanguard 96 LCD protocol RE: Bragi decode, file 62 writes, evidence

Extensively reverse engineered the Corsair Vanguard 96 LCD protocol by
analyzing the Corsair Web Hub JavaScript and iterative HID probing.
Key discoveries: old Bragi 2-byte header protocol, file-based display
system (file 62 = active display, file 28007 = screen resource), custom
BMP format (GRB pixel order, 0x48 prefix), session establishment, and
successful writes to file 62 that change LCD status overlays.

Includes 11 test scripts covering every approach tried (direct LCD
protocol, Bragi file ops, V1.5 protocol, session-based writes) and
48 webcam evidence photos documenting each test result.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: keyboard-oled-re
repository.description: Reverse engineering keyboard OLED/LCD display protocols for Linux control (ROG Azoth X, SteelSeries Apex Pro Gen 3, Corsair Vanguard 96)
